---
title: "About Me"
format: html
toc: true
page-layout: full
about:
    template: jolla
    image: images/logo.png
    image-width: 14em
    image-shape: round
    links:
        - icon: linkedin
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sahil-bhattacharya-257924228
          target: _blank
          text: LinkedIn
        - icon: github
          href: https://github.com/saahi0206
          target: _blank
          text: GitHub
        - icon: envelope
          href: mailto:saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com
          text: Email
        - text: "📄 Download CV"
          href: cv/sahil-bhattacharya-cv.pdf
          target: _blank
---

## Biography

My name is **Sahil Ashish Bhattacharya**. I am currently pursuing an **MSc in Business Analytics** at **Dublin City University (DCU)**, Dublin, Ireland.

My academic journey has given me a strong foundation in quantitative methods, data-driven decision-making, and applied machine learning. I am particularly interested in how AI and ML can be deployed to address real business challenges — from customer retention strategy to natural language processing pipelines.

I enjoy working with data end-to-end: gathering and cleaning raw datasets, building and evaluating predictive models, and communicating insights clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.

---

## Education

**MSc Business Analytics**
Dublin City University (DCU) · Dublin, Ireland · 2024 – Present

---

## Technical Skills

- **Programming:** Python (pandas, scikit-learn, matplotlib, seaborn, transformers), SQL
- **Machine Learning:** Classification, Regression, Clustering, Hyperparameter Tuning, Model Evaluation
- **NLP & AI:** BERT, Transformer Models, Text Classification, Generative AI
- **Data Analytics:** Exploratory Data Analysis, Statistical Modelling, Data Visualisation
- **Tools:** Jupyter Notebook, Google Colab, Git, GitHub, Quarto
- **Business:** CRM Strategy, Customer Segmentation, Business Reporting

---

## Interests

- Machine Learning & Artificial Intelligence
- Natural Language Processing
- Business Analytics & Data-Driven Strategy
- Python Programming
- CRM & Customer Retention Analytics

---

## Contact

| | |
|--|--|
| 📧 Email | [saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com](mailto:saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com) |
| 💼 LinkedIn | [linkedin.com/in/sahil-bhattacharya-257924228](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sahil-bhattacharya-257924228) |
| 🐙 GitHub | [github.com/saahi0206](https://github.com/saahi0206) |
| 📄 CV | [Download PDF](cv/sahil-bhattacharya-cv.pdf) |
